ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "city_ascii" TEXT /* ASCII representation of the city name */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code (e.g., WA, CA) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city center */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city */,
  "population_proper" INTEGER /* Proper population of the city (excluding transient population) */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the city */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the city data (e.g., polygon, point) */,
  "incorporated" INTEGER /* Incorporation status of the city (True/False) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  "zip_codes" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of zip codes associated with the city */,
  "external_id" TEXT /* External identifier for the city */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city data was last updated */,
  "geographic_polygon" TEXT /* Geographic polygon representing the city boundaries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_timezone FOREIGN KEY ("timezone") REFERENCES timezones ("timezone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code (e.g., WA, CA) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary time zone of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state belongs to (e.g., West Coast) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the state belongs to (e.g., Pacific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code (e.g., WA, CA) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary time zone of the county */,
  "geographic_polygon" TEXT /* Geographic polygon representing the county boundaries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the zip code is associated with */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county the zip code is associated with */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code (e.g., WA, CA) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the zip code center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the zip code center */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the zip code */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the zip code in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary time zone of the zip code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the zip code data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the zip code data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_timezone FOREIGN KEY ("timezone") REFERENCES timezones ("timezone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timezones" (
  "timezone_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each time zone */,
  "timezone_name" TEXT /* Name of the time zone (e.g., America/Los_Angeles) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time zone */,
  "gmt_offset" REAL /* GMT offset for the time zone */,
  "utc_offset" REAL /* UTC offset for the time zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timezone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., polygon, point) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_county_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_county_relationships_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_county_relationships_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_state_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code (e.g., WA, CA) */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_state_relationships_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_state_relationships_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_state_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code (e.g., WA, CA) */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_state_relationships_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_state_relationships_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, planner, researcher) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being accessed */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county being accessed */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code (e.g., WA, CA) being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_data_files_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_data_files_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city for the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_population_trends_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county for the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_population_trends_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code (e.g., WA, CA) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state for the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_population_trends_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the city for the given year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the city for the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the economic data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the economic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_economic_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
